name: Sandwich Star Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Grease an 11 x 15-inch (25 x 37 cm) jelly roll pan with shortening. Place sheets of foil on a countertop for cooling cookies.
2. In a large bowl, combine the shortening, brown sugar, water, and vanilla. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended. Add eggs and beat into the creamed mixture.
3. Sift together flour, cocoa, salt, and baking soda. Mix into the creamed mixture at low speed just until blended. Stir in chocolate chips.
4. Spread the batter into the prepared pan using a long metal spatula.
5. Bake for 9 to 11 minutes, or until set. Do not over bake. Cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes. Cut cookies into stars using a 2-inch (5 cm) star-shaped cookie cutter. Remove cookies and cool completely on foil.
6. For the filling, stir together softened cream cheese, icing sugar, whipping cream, and vanilla until smooth.
7. Spread the underside of half of the cooled cookies with filling and top with remaining cookies.
Makes: About 1 dozen cookies
